article_title: Continuous Glucose Monitors Split Into Two Markets as Year-Long Implants and OTC Wellness Sensors Reshape Diabetes and Consumer Health

findings.message: This article was requested by a human editor — apply heightened scrutiny to content accuracy and source quality

content_preview.title: Continuous Glucose Monitors Split Into Two Markets as Year-Long Implants and OTC Wellness Sensors Reshape Diabetes and Consumer Health
content_preview.summary: Real-world data from the first year-long implantable CGM arrives as over-the-counter glucose biosensors pivot toward AI-driven wellness coaching, splitting the market between clinical precision and consumer accessibility.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The continuous glucose monitoring market is diverging into two distinct trajectories. On one end, Senseonics has published the first real-world evidence that an implantable sensor can track blood glucose accurately for an entire year, while on the other, Dexcom and Abbott are racing to turn over-the-counter glucose biosensors into AI-powered wellness coaches for consumers who have never been diagnosed with diabetes. The split reflects a broader transformation in wearable health tech...

editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Senseonics data (5059 sensors, 93.8% wear time) and Dexcom Stelo features sourced from official press releases.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and balanced between clinical and consumer perspectives.
